headline: Jim Cramer Discusses Lennar (LEN) & A Gift To President Trump
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer Discussed Expensive Phones, A Cheap Stock Sector & These 18 Stocks. Lennar Corporation (NYSE:LEN) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Homebuilding giant Lennar Corporation (NYSE:LEN)’s shares are down by a strong 15.7% over the past year and 13.9% year-to-date. RBC Capital reduced the firm’s share price target […]
